briefs.title: BC Problem Gambling Regulation Takes Effect April 2026 — New Rules for Online Gaming Operators
briefs.summary: BC's new Problem Gambling Regulation requires the lottery corporation to block minors and self-excluded individuals (people who have voluntarily banned themselves from gambling) from online gaming accounts, and to clearly display age restriction warnings. The rules also introduce limit-setting tools for deposits, losses, and time spent gambling on the online platform.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming operations and ensure compliance with the new Problem Gambling Regulation before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Problem Gambling Regulation takes effect — Gaming Control Act
